description: Award block that selects one of N award tiers based on a ratio/probability. Each tier has a probability weight and a full AWARD_DATA block. Written/read by LoadAwardDataRatioScale.

serialized_layout.name: m_ulScales
serialized_layout.description: Number of scale tiers (0 = none, maximum MAX_AWARD_SCALES=5).

serialized_layout.name: m_Ratios
serialized_layout.description: Probability ratios for each tier, always written as a fixed array of 5 floats regardless of m_ulScales. Unused slots are 0.0.

serialized_layout.name: m_Awards
serialized_layout.description: m_ulScales full AWARD_DATA records, each with their own variable sections. See award_data.json.

notes: If m_ulScales is 0, only the 4-byte count and 20-byte ratio array are written (24 bytes total, all zeros).
Each AWARD_DATA in m_Awards must be fully parsed including its own variable sections before advancing to the next.
